name: io.github.sGuNk13/kuriflow-mcp
description: Make AI tasks repeatable. Save scripts as workflows that run automatically with new data via email, Google Drive, or schedule. Zero AI tokens per run.

environmentVariables.name: KURIFLOW_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Kuriflow API key. Get one at https://kuriflow.com/signup (Google sign-in, 30 seconds).

environmentVariables.name: KURIFLOW_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Kuriflow backend URL. Defaults to https://api.kuriflow.com — override only for self-hosted deployments.
